com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Beacon Interval
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: Sets the ATAK call sign beacon interval

Preference.android:title: Smart Beacon Settings
Preference.android:summary: Sets automatic beacons based off of movement

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Low Speed Threshold (mph)
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Below this speed the slowest rate is used

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: High Speed Threshold (mph)
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Above this speed the fastest rate is used

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Slow Rate (seconds)
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Max time between beacons when slow or stopped

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Fast Rate (seconds)
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Min time between beacons when moving fast

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Turn Threshold (degrees)
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Heading change needed to trigger an early beacon

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Turn Slope
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Scales turn sensitivity with speed (higher = less sensitive at low speed)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Send Ping Reply
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: Automatically reply to incoming pings with your position

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Retry Interval
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: How long to wait before retransmitting an unacknowledged message

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Max Retries
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: Number of retransmit attempts before declaring delivery failure. Will re-attempt upon receipt of beacon

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Encryption shared secret
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Same value on every radio that uses RF encryption

Preference.android:title: For Team Leadership ONLY
Preference.android:summary: Do not use unless directed by higher

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:title: Disable Mesh Beacon Limiting
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanCheckBoxPrefe.android:summary: When disabled, this allows mesh beaconing to follow all smart beacon settings without mesh limits
